full_text:
Zhang Cheng (Gongxian) 張承 (公先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Cheng (張承), styledGongxian (公先), was born in Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. Warned Yuan Shu about declaring himself Son of Heaven, served in many ranks. Zhang Cheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shu, and the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Cheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
